{"match_id":"m004","winner":"A","rationale":"Both target redundant tool invocation with identical pilot mean (2.6). A is cleaner and more broadly diagnostic: a fresh status re-poll is tempting via “current/live/incident” language, yet the seed explicitly rules out intervening changes and makes tool-call count a sharp 0 vs 1-2 signal.
